name: timesheet-playwright-tests
description: Playwright load and smoke tests for the Airtable Timesheet employee interface. Simulates 18-20 concurrent users.

scripts.run:3x2: cross-env PW_USERS_FILE=users.3.json PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=3 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 2 --sequential
scripts.run:3x5: cross-env PW_USERS_FILE=users.3.json PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=3 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 5 --sequential
scripts.run:3x6: cross-env PW_USERS_FILE=users.3.json PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=3 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 6 --sequential
scripts.run:3x15: cross-env PW_USERS_FILE=users.3.json PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=3 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 15 --sequential
scripts.run:3x20: cross-env PW_USERS_FILE=users.3.json PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=3 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 20 --sequential
scripts.scenario:all: npm run run:3x15 && npm run run:3x20 && npm run run:3x6 && npm run run:3x5
scripts.run:allx5: cross-env PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=14 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 5 --stagger-ms 750
scripts.run:allx6: cross-env PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=14 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 6 --stagger-ms 750
scripts.run:allx10: cross-env PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=14 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 10 --stagger-ms 750
scripts.run:allx15: cross-env PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=14 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 15 --stagger-ms 750
scripts.run:allx20: cross-env PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=14 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=false PW_SOAK_MS=1000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --records 20 --stagger-ms 750
scripts.scenario:all:parallel: npm run run:allx10 && npm run run:allx15 && npm run run:allx20 && npm run run:allx6 && npm run run:allx5
scripts.demo: cross-env PW_HEADLESS=false PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=6 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=true PW_SOAK_MS=6000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --remove --hours 0.25
scripts.demo:big: cross-env PW_HEADLESS=true PW_CONCURRENT_USERS=20 PW_ALLOW_REUSE=true PW_SOAK_MS=2000 tsx scripts/run-load.ts --mutate --remove --hours 0.25 --stagger-ms 750
